abstract.text: A type with a customized textual representation suitable for debugging
purposes.

inlineContent.text: Swift provides a default debugging textual representation for any type.
That default representation is used by the
function for types that don’t provide
their own. To customize that representation, make your type conform to the
as a generic constraint is discouraged.
